summary: P0-03 Country Selector Update & Host+Redirect Regression Testing Complete. All key requirements verified: /api/places/config returns exactly DE, FR, CH, AT countries (TR removed), country_selector_mode=radio, http->https redirect max 1 hop, sitemap preview host 100% correct.

minor.issue: First request sometimes times out (intermittent network, not code issue)

issues: Address form shows 'Adres bloğu admin konfigürasyonunda pasif' when category module doesn't have address enabled - this is expected behavior based on category schema configuration

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: /api/places/config returns country_options = [DE, FR, CH, AT] - exactly 4 countries
PASS: TR (Turkey) is NOT in country_options
PASS: HTTP to HTTPS redirect happens in max 1 hop (tested via urllib)
PASS: HTTPS URL returns 200 directly with no redirect
PASS: Sitemap index URLs all use correct host (marketplace-finance-3.preview.emergentagent.com)
PASS: Main agent's p0_03_host_redirect_regression.json confirms simulated hosts (www.annoncia.com, annoncia.com) have 0 wrong_host_count
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-03 Country Selector update verified. Config endpoints return exactly DE, FR, CH, AT (no TR). Selector mode is 'radio'. Host/redirect regression passed. The ListingDetails.js correctly consumes listing_create_config from /api/places/config but address block visibility depends on individual category schema having modules.address.enabled=true.
